---
title: "William Wynyard"
---

## William Wynyard

**Dates:** (b.1816/7)

### Description

of Hursley

### Biography

He was a JP, and retired from the Bengal Civil Service; he was dead by 1914. [his son in PB 1914; census 1891]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 29th 1884 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
